parameters.query: SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.symbol, a.exchange, a.lower_bound, a.upper_bound, a.status, a.cooldown_until, a.trigger_count, u.settings, u.alerts_chat_id, u.private_chat_id, u.display_name FROM alerts a JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.status = 'active' AND u.is_active = true AND (a.cooldown_until IS NULL OR a.cooldown_until < NOW())
UPDATE alerts SET status = $1, cooldown_until = $2, triggered_at = NOW(), triggered_price = $3, trigger_count = trigger_count + 1, last_triggered_at = NOW() WHERE id = $4

additionalFields.reply_markup: ={{ JSON.stringify({ inline_keyboard: [ [ { text: '💰 Sell', callback_data: 'sell_' + $json.symbol + '_market' }, { text: '📊 Analysis', callback_data: 'predict_' + $json.symbol } ], [ { text: '🔔 Adjust Alert', callback_data: 'alert_prompt_' + $json.symbol }, { text: '❌ Cancel Alert', callback_data: 'cancel_alert_' + $json.symbol } ] ] }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT ks.access_token_encrypted FROM kite_sessions ks JOIN users u ON ks.user_id = u.id WHERE u.is_kite_provider = true AND ks.token_expiry > NOW() LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.symbol, a.exchange, a.lower_bound, a.upper_bound, a.status, a.cooldown_until, a.trigger_count, u.settings, u.alerts_chat_id, u.private_chat_id, u.display_name FROM alerts a JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.status = 'active' AND u.is_active = true AND (a.cooldown_until IS NULL OR a.cooldown_until < NOW())
UPDATE alerts SET status = $1, cooldown_until = $2, triggered_at = NOW(), triggered_price = $3, trigger_count = trigger_count + 1, last_triggered_at = NOW() WHERE id = $4

additionalFields.reply_markup: ={{ JSON.stringify({ inline_keyboard: [ [ { text: '💰 Sell', callback_data: 'sell_' + $json.symbol + '_market' }, { text: '📊 Analysis', callback_data: 'predict_' + $json.symbol } ], [ { text: '🔔 Adjust Alert', callback_data: 'alert_prompt_' + $json.symbol }, { text: '❌ Cancel Alert', callback_data: 'cancel_alert_' + $json.symbol } ] ] }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT ks.access_token_encrypted FROM kite_sessions ks JOIN users u ON ks.user_id = u.id WHERE u.is_kite_provider = true AND ks.token_expiry > NOW() LIMIT 1
